create.subtitleHint: Captions and music are embedded in the video. For full creative control, turn them off and add your own captions and music in the Editor.

dashboard.firstCampaign: Launch your first video campaign to track progress here.
dashboard.noVideosSub: Your generated videos will appear here. Create your first one!
scripts.useVideoPrompt: create a video using this script: {script}
clones.setupDesc: Create your AI Clone profile with your voice and a reference photo. The AI will use this to generate videos with your own face and voice.
clones.photoTip: Use a high-quality, well-lit portrait photo. Vertical (9:16) works best.
clones.voiceIdTip: Find your Voice ID in ElevenLabs → Voices → click your voice → View API ID.
clones.noLooksSub: Upload a portrait photo of yourself to get started. Use a high-quality, well-lit photo for best results.
clones.generatingTime: This takes 2–3 min. You can leave this page.
clones.genModalTitle: Generate a New Look with AI
clones.genModalDesc: Describe the outfit and setting you want. The AI will generate a new photo of you in that look, preserving your face identity.
clones.describePlaceholder: e.g. standing in a modern office, wearing a navy blazer and white shirt, bright natural light
scripts.title: Scripts
scripts.subtitle: Your library of structured UGC video scripts, organised by methodology and category.
scripts.searchPlaceholder: Search scripts by hook, product, or influencer...
scripts.noScriptsSub: Create your first script using AI or write one manually.
scripts.aiDesc: Configure your script and let AI generate a human-sounding, methodology-driven script in seconds.
scripts.contextPlaceholder: Any specific angles, key benefits, or talking points you want the script to include...
scripts.csvDesc: Fill in one row per script. Required columns are marked below. Save as .csv and upload when ready.
scripts.orClick: or click to browse your computer
scripts.csvNote: Accepts .csv files only -- max 500 rows per upload
scripts.warningNote: Scripts with warnings will still be imported. You can edit them after upload.

manage.sessionDesc: Sign out of your current session on this device.
manage.topUpDesc: Buy extra credits instantly — added to your current balance
manage.topUpFooter: Credits are added instantly. Unused credits roll over one month, then expire if not used.
manage.topUpInsufficientNotice: You have {balance} credits but this action needs {required}. Top up to continue.
upgrade.title: Choose Your Plan
upgrade.subtitle: Every plan includes full access to all features. Upgrade when you need more credits.
upgrade.videoEstimateFootnote: *Estimates based on digital 15s UGC (67 cr), cinematic product shots (54 cr), and AI clone 15s (53 cr). Cinematic ads and physical products use more credits.
upgrade.agencyBanner: Are you an Agency looking to create 100+ videos per month?
plan.starter.tagline: Everything you need to start creating AI UGC videos.
plan.creator.tagline: For creators and brands publishing content consistently.
plan.business.tagline: For teams and businesses scaling content production.
plan.agency.tagline: For agencies and power users managing multiple brands.

connections.securityNote: Your credentials are handled securely by Ayrshare — we never see your social media passwords. After connecting a new account, it may take 2–3 minutes to appear as connected on this page.

creativeOs.projects.deleteCountConfirm: Delete {n} project(s)? This action cannot be undone.

creativeOs.agent.clearConfirm: Clear this agent chat? This cannot be undone.
creativeOs.agent.disconnected: Connection lost. Your generation is still running — refresh to reconnect.

creativeOs.agent.sceneModeToCamera: Looking at camera, showing the product
creativeOs.agent.insufficientCreditsChat: You don't have enough credits for this generation. I've opened top-up options so you can continue.

creativeOs.createBar.successImage: ✓ Generation started! Your image will appear shortly.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Generate videos, images and full ad campaigns by simply chatting with AI.
onboarding.capabilitiesSubtitle: From viral TikToks to high-converting ad creatives. Studio handles it all.
onboarding.ugcDesc: AI influencers hold your product, speak your script, and deliver scroll-stopping content.
onboarding.productShotsDesc: Professional product photography powered by AI — studio quality in seconds.
onboarding.cinematicDesc: Premium brand films with cinematic camera movements and visual storytelling.
onboarding.agentDesc: Type what you want in plain English or Spanish. Your agent automatically handles the scripting, casting, generation, editing and posting.
onboarding.agentExample: "Create a UGC ad with Lexi showing my product and saying it's the best new thing for summer"
onboarding.agentHint: Use @ to reference your products & influencers.
onboarding.subscribe.title: Choose your plan to get started
onboarding.subscribe.subtitle: Subscribe to unlock Studio and receive your monthly credits. You can start creating right after payment.
onboarding.subscribe.confirmTimeout: Payment is taking longer than expected. Please refresh or contact support if credits do not appear.
schedule.cancelConfirm: Remove this scheduled post? It will not be published to social.
schedule.cancelFailed: Could not cancel this post. Please try again.
connections.metaLoginHint: Linking opens in a new browser tab. Creator/Business Instagram accounts without a Facebook Page should use the direct Instagram button on the Ayrshare page. If the popup shows “Linked” but this page stays “Not connected”, click Instagram to unlink, reconnect, accept every permission, then click Close on Ayrshare before returning here.
connections.verifying: Verifying your connection with Ayrshare — this can take up to 3 minutes after you finish linking in the popup. Keep this tab open.
connections.linkIncomplete: Ayrshare’s popup showed “Linked” but the connection did not register. On the Ayrshare page: click Instagram to unlink, then reconnect with the Instagram button (Creator accounts without a Facebook Page) or Facebook / “Instagram via Facebook” (if you have a linked Page). Accept all permissions, click Close, then press Refresh status here.

publish.subtitle: Schedule, post, and analyze your social content
analytics.search.placeholder: Paste any post URL or @ handle to analyze
analytics.search.placeholderPosts: Paste any post URL to analyze
analytics.search.platform.label: Platform
analytics.empty.title: No posts tracked yet
analytics.empty.body: Paste a post URL or @handle above to start tracking — published posts from your Calendar will show up here automatically.
analytics.detail.locale.failed: Could not translate this analysis to your language.
analytics.detail.locale.notConfigured: Translation requires OPENAI_API_KEY on the server.
analytics.detail.locale.slow: Translation is taking longer than usual…
analytics.detail.error.permanentBody: Something went wrong while analyzing this video. Try again — or open the post on the original platform to verify it's still available.
analytics.detail.error.network: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
analytics.detail.error.server: The analysis service hit a temporary error. Try again in a moment.
analytics.detail.error.startFailed: Could not start AI breakdown. Try again.
analytics.detail.error.busy: The AI analysis service is temporarily busy. Try again in a moment.
analytics.detail.error.rateLimit: We've hit the per-minute rate limit on the AI provider. Try again in a minute.
analytics.detail.error.timeout: The analysis took too long this time. Try again in a moment.
analytics.detail.error.tooLarge: This video is too large to analyze right now.
analytics.detail.error.notConfigured: AI analysis is not configured on this environment yet.
analytics.detail.error.genericUnavailabl: AI analysis is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
analytics.detail.prep.preparing: Preparing video for inline playback and AI analysis…
analytics.detail.prep.scraping: Fetching the original video from the platform…
analytics.detail.prep.failed: We couldn't prepare this video for analysis.
analytics.detail.prep.missingPostUrl: This post is missing a valid platform link. Re-scrape the account or re-add the post by URL, then retry video prep.
analytics.detail.prep.brightdataFailed: Could not fetch this post from Instagram. Refresh analytics data to update the link, or re-scrape the account.
analytics.detail.prep.videoOnly: AI hook analysis is available for video posts only.
analytics.detail.export.hint: Download a report with metrics and AI breakdown
analytics.detail.export.caption: Caption
analytics.detail.export.analysisNone: AI breakdown has not been generated yet. Metrics and caption are included in this report.
analytics.detail.export.analysisRunning: AI analysis was still in progress when this report was exported. Re-export after analysis completes for the full breakdown.
analytics.detail.export.analysisPending: AI breakdown is not available yet.
analytics.detail.export.analysisFailed: AI analysis did not complete. Metrics and caption are included; re-run analysis and export again for the full breakdown.

brands.studio.brand.scrapeHint: Paste a URL and hit enter. Code reads the site's fonts, colors, voice, and images.

brands.studio.credits.insufficient: Not enough credits — need {required}, you have {balance}

brands.studio.row.editIdeaTitle: Click to edit - your edit feeds the render
brands.studio.rerender.title: Re-render slides
brands.studio.modal.caption: Caption
brands.studio.fallback.templateMode: Template mode — OpenRouter is unavailable. Ideas and captions are built-in placeholders, not Claude Sonnet 4.6. Add OPENROUTER_API_KEY to env and restart Creative OS.
brands.studio.confirm.reset: Reset RENDER Studio to defaults? This clears the loaded brand and every generated row.
brands.studio.arches.batchDirection: This batch's direction: {dir} - the slides lean into that.
brands.studio.toast.storageFull: Browser storage is full - some uploads may not persist
brands.studio.toast.imagesAdded: Added {count} {type} image{plural} · saved to this browser
brands.studio.toast.scraped: Scraped {name} from {url} · saved to your computer
brands.studio.toast.loadedBaked: Loaded baked {name} · run python server.py to scrape live
brands.studio.toast.scrapeServer: To scrape any URL, run python server.py and open localhost:5056
brands.studio.toast.scrapeTimeout: This site took too long to load. Try again or use a simpler brand page.
brands.studio.toast.openRouterMissing: OpenRouter not configured — ideas will use built-in templates unless the key is set
brands.studio.toast.askingAi: Asking the AI for {count} on-brand idea{plural} for {name}...
brands.studio.toast.aiUnavailable: AI ideas unavailable ({error}) — using built-in templates. Check OpenRouter key + Creative OS on :8001.
brands.studio.toast.visionFallback: Some brand images could not be analyzed — ideas were generated from text only.
brands.studio.toast.renderingRow: Row {id}: rendering all {total} slides with GPT Image 2
brands.studio.toast.logoUnavailable: Logo could not be used for render — upload a PNG logo or retry scrape.
brands.studio.toast.noSlidesRendered: No slides rendered — check Fal key and Creative OS on :8001
brands.studio.toast.scheduleFirst: Render the carousel first - no images to schedule
brands.studio.toast.resetDone: Reset to defaults - no brand, no rows
brands.studio.toast.restored: Restored your previous Brand Studio work
brands.studio.toast.recoveredRenders: Recovered {count} saved carousel slide{plural} from storage
